  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

WCBS2_v0.3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7AA
Recv ID: 7AD
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 82
Func Name: WCGS

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "8",
    "supplier": "LGE_VIETN",
    "soft": "SW03.00",
    "version": "M0.1.03_C1.0.00"
  },

    "diagversion": "8",
    "supplier": "LGE_VIETN",
    "soft": "SW04.00",
    "version": "M1.1.00_C1.0.00"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "8",
    "supplier": "LGE_VIETN",
    "soft": "SW06.00",
    "version": "SUB_VER.0.00.05"
  }
]

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "circuit voltage out of range"

  },
  {

    "dtctype": 4,

    "name": "lost communication with Electronic Stability Control on IC CAN"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49273,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Bus OFF(Failures)"
  }
]
